title: teucrium rotundifolium subsp. dealianum
intro: Teucrium rotundifolium subsp. dealianum, commonly known as Dealian Germander, is a subspecies of perennial plant belonging to the genus Teucrium in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Dealian Germander include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Dealian Germander can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
